overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the Van Horn trading post at night. The character walks along a wooden waterfront dock, experiences a sudden rain shower, and continues onto the dirt main street of the frontier town, passing wooden buildings and warm street lamps under a cloudy, moonlit sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden waterfront dock at Van Horn trading post

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the town buildings, with harbor water visible to the left

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
calm water of the harbor reflecting distant lights
large painted sign on warehouse reading VAN HORN
two-story wooden building with balcony and warm interior lighting
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden waterfront dock at night, with harbor water to the left and wooden frontier buildings to the right. The Van Horn trading post sign is visible ahead as the character moves toward the town center under cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront boardwalk transitioning to main street during rainfall

events.description: rain begins falling suddenly, creating visible streaks and wetting the wooden surfaces

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk as rain starts, moving from the wooden dock onto mixed ground near the buildings

entered.detail: muddy dirt path replacing the wooden planks as the character moves inland
patches of grass and weeds growing alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Rain begins falling as the character walks past the two-story saloon, transitioning from the wooden dock onto a dirt path. The wooden walkway gives way to muddy ground with grass verges as the character moves deeper into the town.

scene_state.functional_zone: frontier town main street with wooden storefronts

events.description: transition from wooden dock to dirt main street of the town

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the dirt main street, passing wooden storefronts and street lamps

entered.detail: row of wooden commercial buildings with porches on the left side of the street
wooden buildings with balconies and lit windows on the right side
tall lighthouse or watchtower visible in the distance near the water
abandoned wooden wagon or cart parked beside the building

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the wide dirt main street of the frontier town, flanked by wooden storefronts with warm lamplight. A lighthouse structure is visible in the distance to the left, and the wet ground reflects the street lamps as the rain subsides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a waterfront dock that leads toward the center of a frontier trading post at night. It begins with the character walking beside the harbor water, flanked by rustic wooden buildings under a heavy, cloudy sky. As the camera advances, the perspective shifts toward the town's interior, drawing closer to the architecture of the settlement. The scene then opens up to reveal the Van Horn trading post sign ahead before the character continues their approach into the heart of the town.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wooden waterfront dock into the heart of a rain-slicked frontier town. It begins as rain starts to fall while the character passes a two-story saloon, transitioning from the wooden walkway onto a muddy dirt path with grassy verges. As the character moves deeper into the town, the scene opens onto a wide main street flanked by wooden storefronts glowing with warm lamplight. The wet ground reflects the golden light of the lamps as the rain gradually subsides, revealing a distant lighthouse structure to the left.
